title: Business Development Representative
description: Procter & Gamble is seeking a Business Development Representative to identify and develop partnership opportunities. You'll engage with potential partners, analyze market opportunities, and support deal execution. Work onsite in San Francisco for the global consumer goods leader.
responsibilities: Identify and qualify new business partnership opportunities
Develop business proposals and pitch presentations
Negotiate terms and support contract execution
Maintain relationships with partners and stakeholders

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Business, Finance, or related field

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage
